channel.title: Chroniq Now: Breaking Global News and Headlines Daily
channel.description: Chroniq Now - your trusted source for breaking global news, in-depth analysis and up-to-the-minute coverage of politics, business, culture and more.

item.title: Apple Business Launch: New All-in-One Platform for U.S. SMEs
item.description:
Apple officially debuts 'Apple Business,' a centralized platform for device management, professional email, and a new ad network integrated directly into Apple Maps.

Key points:
• Apple Business consolidates three existing services — Business Essentials, Business Manager, and Business Connect — into a single free platform launching April 14 in 200+ countries
• Includes built-in Mobile Device Management (MDM) with zero-touch device deployment and pre-configured app and security policy "Blueprints"
• Businesses can set up custom domain professional email, shared calendars, and a company directory natively through Apple's infrastructure for the first time
• A new Apple Maps ad network, launching in the U.S. and Canada this summer, lets businesses bid for placements at the top of search results using a privacy-first model

Read the full article: Apple Business Launch: New All-in-One Platform for U.S. SMEs

item.title: Driven Advisors Scrutinized: Bancrédito Holding Dispute
item.description:
Driven Advisors and Administrative Services face scrutiny in a legal dispute with Bancrédito Holding Corp, owner of Bancrédito International Bank and Trust.

Read the full article: Driven Advisors Scrutinized: Bancrédito Holding Dispute
